cadence_note: The EPO refreshes the Statistics & Trends Centre / Technology Dashboard backing files with each annual Patent Index edition, published in the spring for the preceding calendar year (the 2025 edition, covering data through 2025, is the current one). Re-checking monthly is ample: the 5 JSON files total ~4MB, so an unchanged fetch is cheap, and a monthly tick catches the annual drop within weeks rather than waiting on a year-long timer. No published release calendar with exact dates; https://www.epo.org/en/about-us/statistics is the announcement surface.
